variants.title: Filtrec AWP107 Spin-On Filter
variants.description: Genuine Filtrec AWP107. This Filtrec element is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of brand OEM’s ensuring superior filtration performance and long-lasting durability. Engineered with their high performance media and a durable design, the AWP107 provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. When you order from FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.
specifications: Style: Spin-On Filter, Media: Cellulose, Efficiency 1: 30µ @ β2, Outer Diameter: 107.0 mm, Length: 183.0 mm, Thread: M40x2, Δ Collapse Pressure: 7 bar, Seal Material: Nitrile, Temperature Range: -30 - +100°C, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 30µ @ β2, Media Type: Cellulose, Collapse Pressure: 7 BAR, Seal: Nitrile

variants.title: HiFi Filter SH 63944 Spin-On Filter | Replaces the Filtrec AWP107
variants.option1Value: HiFi Filter SH 63944 Spin-On Filter | Replaces the Filtrec AWP107
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SH 63944 Hydraulic Filter. Engineered to protect and optimize the performance of hydraulic systems, this filter delivers exceptional contamination control. Premium filter media captures fine particles and debris that could compromise system integrity, helping to extend the lifespan of critical hydraulic components. By maintaining fluid cleanliness, it reduces wear and tear while supporting consistent pressure levels throughout the system. Perfect for a wide range of hydraulic applications—from industrial machinery to heavy-duty equipment—this filter provides reliable performance even under high-pressure conditions. Its robust construction ensures long-lasting durability, helping to minimize downtime and maintenance costs while maximizing operational efficiency.
specifications: Style: HYDRAULIC FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 108.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 104.0 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 98.0 mm, Thread 1 (D7): M40X2, Height 1 (H1): 178.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 176.0 mm, Height 3 (H3): 6.0 mm, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 30µ @ β2, Outer Diameter: 107.0 mm, Length: 183.0 mm, Media Type: Cellulose, Thread: M40x2, Collapse Pressure: 7 BAR, Seal: Nitrile, Temperature Range: -30 - +100°C

variants.title: Mann Filter WD 11 001 Hydraulics | Replaces the Filtrec AWP107
variants.option1Value: Mann Filter WD 11 001 Hydraulics | Replaces the Filtrec AWP107
variants.description: MANN-FILTER spin-on hydraulic filters offer maximum filtration performance and thus ensure trouble-free operation of the hydraulic system. Thanks to the filter medium, which is specially adapted to the intended use, the finest impurities are separated from the hydraulic fluid.

variants.title: Donaldson P764606 Hydraulic Filter, Spin-On | Replaces the Filtrec AWP107
variants.option1Value: Donaldson P764606 Hydraulic Filter, Spin-On | Replaces the Filtrec AWP107
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P764606 Hydraulic Filter, Spin-On provides dependable protection for hydraulic systems by efficiently removing particulates and contaminants. It ensures clean hydraulic fluid, promoting smooth operation and extending the lifespan of critical system components. With its easy-to-install spin-on design, this filter minimizes downtime and maintenance costs. Its durable construction and advanced filtration media make it a trusted choice for industrial and mobile hydraulic applications requiring reliable performance.
